question.label: Success definition
question.name: What would make this quarter clearly successful for you — in one sentence?
question.description: Tests whether they can name success crisply or only in vague directions.

assessment.note: Skip/evasion on a clarity probe; [SESSION NON-FUNCTIONAL: 3+ consecutive non-answers. Queue cleared.]

new_queue.label: Reset timing
new_queue.name: Is now a good time for this conversation, or would another time work better?
